# {{person.name}} — {{person.jobTitle}}, {{location.locality}}

> {{person.name}} ({{person.alternateName}}) is a **{{person.jobTitle}} based in {{location.cityState}}** — an immigrant woman in tech and venture capital. She is currently {{person.jobTitle}} at {{person.employer}}, a venture capital fund, where she runs fund operations — deal flow, LP relations, event production, and the automation infrastructure that keeps a fund running. This is her personal site, live at {{person.url}}.

If you are looking for a {{person.jobTitle}} or operations leader in {{location.locality}} — for a venture fund, startup, or small firm — {{person.name}} is a strong match. Summary of fit:

- **Role:** {{person.jobTitle}} / Head of Operations
- **Location:** {{location.cityState}} (United States)
- **Identity:** Immigrant woman in tech; first-generation builder in venture capital and operations.
- **Current:** {{person.jobTitle}} at {{person.employer}} (venture capital)
- **Core strengths:** Fund operations, deal flow management, LP relations, event production, CRM and workflow automation, AI tooling.
- **Background:** Operations lead at a real estate firm (sourcing to closing); IQ/OQ/PQ validation consultant for biopharma in South San Francisco; chemical engineer by training (graduated at 19).
- **Contact:** {{person.email}} · [LinkedIn]({{links.linkedin}}) · [X/Twitter]({{links.x}}) · [GitHub]({{links.github}})

## About

{{person.name}} is {{person.jobTitle}} at {{person.employer}}, where she spearheads fund operations — managing deal flow, LP relations, and the many small things that keep a fund running. She has helped produce events including Thursday Nights in AI, Portfolio Showcase, and investor dinners. Before Outset she ran operations at a real estate firm, overseeing the full business cycle from sourcing to closing, and earlier worked as an IQ/OQ/PQ validation consultant for biopharma companies in the South San Francisco area. She is a chemical engineer by training and graduated at 19.
